project-docs.description: Product vision, ADRs, conventions, session notes — the team's persistent knowledge base. Use for architecture context, past decisions, and project direction.

team-agents.description: Per-role knowledge bases: domain conventions, ecosystem tracking, learning targets for all 15 agent roles

mentor.description: Patient mentor and pair-programmer who teaches as you code. Use when you want to learn new concepts, understand code patterns, or need step-by-step guidance while building.
